title: Soak Test - Headset disconnected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Verify app remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle soak test with headset disconnected and app in background
steps: Install and launch app, pair headset, turn off headset, go to Home Screen.
Put app in background and leave phone idle.
After a few hours (ideally overnight or when phone can be idle for multiple hours), check the app.
expected: Home screen shows headset as disconnected. App stays stable and running while in background. After a few hours, app is still running and user can interact normally.
